name: Existentialism

quotes.text: Man is condemned to be free; because once thrown into the world, he is responsible for everything he does.
quotes.author: Jean-Paul Sartre

quotes.text: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

modernReframes: Your imposter syndrome stems from waiting for a system or a job title to define your validity. Existentialism says no pre-baked script exists. You aren't an imposter; you are completely free to define your own parameters of success.
The burnout you feel isn't just exhaustion; it's a crisis of meaning. Stop looking for the corporation to provide your 'Why'. You must architect your own purpose outside the sprint cycle.
